question: Handle unknown words with BPE. Tokens not in vocabulary should map to <|unk|> token.
template:
import tiktoken

enc = tiktoken.get_encoding('gpt2')
text = "Hello xyzunknownword123"
tokens = enc.encode(text, allowed_special=???)
print(f"Tokens with unknown: {tokens}")
answer:
import tiktoken

enc = tiktoken.get_encoding('gpt2')
text = "Hello xyzunknownword123"
tokens = enc.encode(text, allowed_special='all')
print(f"Tokens with unknown: {tokens}")
